overview:
## Discussion

Configurations are immutable. To change or remove the image that the message list item’s trailing region shows, create a new configuration and update the list item’s [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMessageListItem/trailingConfiguration] property.

A configuration’s image can’t be larger than [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMaximumMessageItemImageSize]. If you use an animated image, this property returns the first image in the animation sequence.

# trailingImage

**Instance Property**

The configuration’s image.

## Declaration

```swift
var trailingImage: UIImage? { get }
```

## Discussion

Configurations are immutable. To change or remove the image that the message list item’s trailing region shows, create a new configuration and update the list item’s [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMessageListItem/trailingConfiguration] property.

A configuration’s image can’t be larger than [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMaximumMessageItemImageSize]. If you use an animated image, this property returns the first image in the animation sequence.
title: trailingImage
